title: Face to Face Meetings with ETs?
summary: This interview discusses alleged face-to-face meetings between United States officials and extraterrestrial beings from other star systems. The conversation references claims about a 'Galactic Federation' and beings monitoring life across different planets in the galaxy.

key_claims.claim: There have been face-to-face meetings between United States officials and visitors from other star systems
A former Israeli space official claims to have proof of a Galactic Federation
Extraterrestrial beings are part of a team monitoring planets where life has begun across the galaxy
An extraterrestrial being was voluntarily interviewed and answered questions about their origins
